Manipulating deformable liner objects, such as following a cable, is easy for human beings but presents a significant challenge for robots. The application demand for UAV in logistics distribution is vast and its accurate and rapid path planning research has practical value. Nowadays, the RRT algorithm is one of the most popular path planning methods for UAV delivery. Although the search of RRT is fast, the planned path is generally not the optimal path.
